codeReview.summary: Current HEAD and commit 9877bbc cover the assigned worker-hardening behaviors without blocking defects. The runtime preserves configurable target history depth, restart recovery is exercised through persisted cursor/backoff scenarios, top-100 leasing priority and exponential backoff reset behavior are covered in worker-state tests, and diagnostics now expose backfill-health metrics with both HTTP-boundary and summary-level assertions.

summary: Pass. Reviewed handoff, commit diff, transcript skeleton, current runtime/worker-state/diagnostics code, and relevant tests. No blocking issues found; no shared-state gaps noted.
